name: Imbabura (Ecuador)
description: Three equal horizontal stripes of red, white and green; a blue isosceles triangle along the hoist with its apex at the centre of the flag.
history: Imbabura Province was established on 25 June 1824; its capital is Ibarra ("the White City"). The province is named for the Imbabura volcano.

features.role: blue isosceles triangle along the hoist with its apex at the centre
